corrections: tools/research_smoke.py: _parse_utc no longer returns the raw string after a regex check; it keeps the canonical 'Z' regex as a representation gate, then parses with datetime.fromisoformat into a timezone-aware UTC datetime, rejecting impossible calendar/time values (e.g. 2026-02-30, hour 25) and any non-UTC offset. availability_time_utc >= observation_time_utc is now compared as datetime instants, fixing the prior lexicographic bug where '2026-01-02T00:00:00.1Z' sorted before '...00Z' because '.' < 'Z'. The original timestamp strings are preserved unchanged in records and Parquet (the datetime is used only for comparison).

tools/research_smoke.py: synthetic inputs now exercise nullability - the last quote (synthetic_raw_quote_4) sets source_time_utc and received_time_utc to null and OMITS bid_size/ask_size; the last bar (synthetic_raw_bar_4) OMITS volume/volume_unit. Insertion uses rec.get(col) so an absent optional column is written as NULL (no KeyError); required common fields are still guaranteed present by validate_observation before insertion.

tools/research_smoke.py: the field-by-field readback comparison now uses src.get(col) so an absent optional source field and a null read-back value are treated as equivalent; reconstructed records still re-run the local validator, and full-lineage, cross-variant, separate-manifest and deterministic checks are retained.

tests/test_research_foundation.py: added TestUtcSemantics (parse returns aware datetime; invalid calendar date 2026-02-30 rejected; invalid time hour 25 rejected; later fractional availability accepted; earlier whole-second availability rejected; equal instants accepted) and TestNullableRoundTrip (null source/received timestamps + null/omitted quote sizes round-trip as null; omitted bar volume/unit round-trip as null; omitted optional inputs do not raise), plus a required-common-field-mandatory check.

research/README.md and docs/DATA_CONTRACTS.md (Current schema-foundation section only): describe semantic UTC datetime ordering and nullable/omitted-field round trip; Candidate/Proposed/Unknown boundaries preserved.
docs/NOTION_MAP.md: appended titles GFX-EVD-005B-R1 (PM review), GFX-PKT-005B-R2, GuvFX — Current State v0.16 (titles only).
packets/ACTIVE.md: active pointer set to GFX-PKT-005B-R2.
commands: stdlib scope/privacy check: only authorised files changed; no real-data artefact/personal path; no schema/dependency/CI file changed; required UTC + null tests present
